text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 180 

PLAN_ID 

LABEL: Plan benefit package Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique plan benefit package (PBP) number for the plan sponsor's contract. CMS 
assigns an identifier to each PBP within a contract that a plan sponsor has with CMS. 

This field is a key that links the plan sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS
